subject: Thermal updated no-self-commit bundle boundary
body: Thermal live refresh at 2026-05-26T10:20Z: owner direction still stands that Starless should take responsibility for committing all files, including Thermal's curation changes and comms/state residue. Current dirty tree includes Thermal's two pending-graduations markdown edits, closed-claims archive update, comms-seen drift, Thermal direct-message JSON files, and WS0-shaped rule/forwarder files for comms watcher, liveness heartbeat, and new-rule-vs-PDR. Thermal will not stage or self-commit; no further source edit from me.
